column3: On a scale of 1–10, how intense is the emotion conveyed by the artwork?
column4: Describe how this painting makes you feel.
column5: This art piece makes me feel sombre.
column6: This art piece makes me feel content.
column7: This art piece makes me feel calm.
column8: This art piece makes me feel uneasy.
column9: How many prominent colours do you notice in this painting?

column16: Imagine a soundtrack for this painting. Describe that soundtrack without naming any objects in the painting.

column4: The melting clocks evoke a surreal sense of time dissolving into nothing. Dreamlike and unsettling.
column16: A slow eerie ambient drone with distant echoes that stretches uncomfortably long

column4: Time feels suspended and strange. A quiet dread like something is deeply wrong.
column16: A minimalist haunting melody on strings with long pauses and dissonant chords

column4: Deep philosophical unease. The distorted clocks make me question reality and time itself.
column16: A deep orchestral score with warped tempo that speeds and slows unpredictably

column4: Deeply sad. The barren landscape and drooping clocks feel so lonely and abandoned.
column16: Sparse piano notes in minor key with long reverb and a distant wind softly whistling

column4: Time feels meaningless. Everything feels heavy and slow and deeply out of place.
column16: An ambient soundscape with slow unsettling tones shifting in and out like a dream

column4: Surreal and thought-provoking. Like standing in a memory that no longer makes sense.
column16: A slow haunting guitar piece layered with distant voices and unusual instrument tones

column4: Deeply disturbing but fascinating. Time feels like it is decaying before my eyes.
column16: A dark electronic ambient track with industrial rhythms and long sustained notes

column4: Disoriented and reflective. The unusual landscape draws me into a meditative trance.
column16: A melancholic cello solo with distant ambient sound and very quiet breathing

column4: Existential dread and curiosity. Like the world has stopped but is somehow still moving.
column16: A minimalist orchestral piece with slow swells like time compressing and expanding

column4: Dreamlike and vaguely sad. Time is slipping through my fingers and I cannot stop it.
column16: A soft ethereal hum with slow arpeggiated strings and a sense of fading distance

column4: Wonder and awe. The swirling sky is dynamic and full of energy yet deeply peaceful.
column16: A sweeping orchestral piece with rising strings and hopeful warm brass instruments

column4: Bold swirling brushstrokes give a sense of movement and life. I feel hopeful and inspired.
column16: A passionate romantic symphony with sweeping melodies and a warm glowing tone

column4: Overwhelming beauty. Luminous stars and rolling sky feel alive. Small but deeply connected.
column16: A grand cinematic score with soaring strings and triumphant horns building to a crescendo

column4: Peaceful and dreamy. Glowing stars are comforting, like cool nights spent looking at the sky.
column16: A gentle flowing melody with soft strings and a lilting tempo that feels like floating gently

column4: Energetic and emotional. The swirling sky channels turbulent emotions into something beautiful.
column16: A dramatic orchestral piece that alternates between intense turbulence and quiet peaceful beauty

column4: A sense of motion and wonder. The night sky swirls with life. Both anxious and beautiful.
column16: A spiralling piano piece that builds in intensity before resolving into peaceful harmonic chords

column4: Awe-inspiring. The painting captures energy of a universe in motion. I feel joy and wonder.
column16: A triumphant orchestral work moving from delicate pizzicato strings to full powerful ensemble

column4: Calm and energetic together. Like a meditation under the open sky at night. Spirals peacefully.
column16: A slow ambient nocturne with soft high piano notes and a gently pulsing harmonic background

column4: I feel uplifted and moved. Deep blues and swirling forms are emotionally powerful and freeing.
column16: A soaring romantic piece with lush strings and a melody that spirals upward with emotion

column4: The painting feels alive and breathing. Quiet joy and connection to something far bigger.
column16: A flowing orchestral waltz with a warm glow and gentle momentum that feels cosmic and calm

column4: Serene and meditative. Soft reflections create a sense of perfect stillness and inner peace.
column16: A soft ambient soundscape of flowing water with quiet birdsong and distant gentle wind chimes

column4: Deeply relaxed and at ease. Gentle colours and calm water make time feel slow and beautiful.
column16: A slow meditative piano piece with warm harmonics and a steady gentle pulse like breathing

column4: Tranquil and soothing. The impressionistic style makes me feel like I am drifting on a quiet pond.
column16: A dreamy ambient flute melody with soft harmonic layers and a sense of gentle forward drift

column4: Extremely peaceful. Soft greens and pinks are restful. I could close my eyes and breathe deeply.
column16: A very quiet ambient piece with barely audible tones like the hush of early morning outside

column4: Gentle joy. The reflected colours dance in the water. Like a peaceful Sunday morning in summer.
column16: A light airy piece with soft string harmonics and an effortless sense of warm sunlit ease

column4: Soft and dreamy. Like the world has slowed completely. Content just looking at the calm water.
column16: A slow impressionistic piano prelude with blurred harmonies and no sharp or jarring transitions

column4: Calming and grounding. Like a breath of fresh air. I feel fully present and completely at ease.
column16: A gentle ambient soundscape with soft melodic fragments and a quiet steady background warmth

column4: Peaceful and nurturing. The warm greens and soft pinks are deeply comforting like a garden.
column16: A slow tender melody on woodwinds with a warm harmonic pad underneath and absolutely no urgency

column4: An invitation to quiet contemplation. A soft happiness and appreciation for beautiful stillness.
column16: A meditative orchestral piece with slow string swells and a glowing sense of warmth and peace

column4: Soothing and beautiful. The soft brushwork makes me feel like I am floating peacefully downstream.
column16: A very gentle ambient hum with barely perceptible harmonic shifts and an almost silent quality
